description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a robust, rectangular metal receiver and a short, wide barrel cluster, likely designed for close-quarters use. The barrel section features three distinct openings, suggesting a triple-barrel configuration, and is finished in a dark, matte metallic color. The grip is a pronounced pistol-style handle, colored in a deep brown, likely simulating wood or polymer, and ergonomically curved for a secure hold. A metallic trigger guard and trigger are visible beneath the receiver, with the guard being rounded and moderately sized. The underside of the receiver includes a small, brown accent, possibly a latch or loading port. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality and durability.
description: A compact, triple-barrel shotgun with a dark metal receiver and a brown pistol grip, featuring a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the brown pistol grip, rectangular receiver, and the trigger guard beneath.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the three barrel openings, emphasizing the shotgun's triple-barrel configuration and the angular receiver shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the brown grip and metallic receiver visible, as well as the trigger guard and accent on the underside.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the pistol grip and the top of the receiver, with the barrels receding away from view.
attribute_barrel_configuration: triple-barrel, side-by-side cluster with three parallel barrels and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a simple, unreinforced design
